a beneficiary panel to identify those at highest risk for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD).

The Million Hearts® Cardiovascular Disease Risk Reduction Model used data-driven predictive modeling approaches to generate individualized risk scores and mitigation plans for eligible Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries.
The data from the trial is released as a suite of seventeen linked data files. The data include detailed information about the beneficiaries, physician practices,
